differential_diagnoses: Digitalis toxicity (due to potential unrecognized ingestion or altered metabolism)
Supraventricular tachycardia (e.g., atrial tachycardia or atrial flutter with 1:1 conduction)
Decompensated heart failure with high-output state or tachycardia-induced cardiomyopathy
next_steps: Immediate emergency department transfer and stabilization
Urgent ICD interrogation to determine rhythm and history of device therapy
Point-of-care cardiac ultrasound to evaluate for mechanical complications or wall motion abnormalities
Obtain cardiac enzymes (troponin) and electrolytes (potassium, magnesium)
Correct hemodynamic instability with intravenous fluids or vasoactive agents as needed
Consider pharmacological or electrical cardioversion if the patient remains hemodynamically unstable
